name: The First Bite
meaning: You knew it was too hot, but you did it anyway. Now your tongue is scorched, your dignity dented, and your dinner ruined. This card symbolizes impulsive actions that feel good for half a second and painful for far longer.
reversed_meaning: You hesitated. You let it cool. You dodged disaster — this time. But are you holding back too much, even when the moment calls for boldness?
visual: A hand holding a steaming slice of pizza with molten cheese dripping onto an open mouth mid-scream. In the background: a warning sign ignored, a ghost of better judgment. Flames flicker behind the crust. One slice already missing.
notes: Drawn during a moment of deep karmic snack reflection. Often appears when the heart is hungry but the mind has gone temporarily offline.
